headline: Vantage Introduces 24/7 Gold CFD Trading with XAUUSD247
summary: Vantage Markets ("Vantage"), a multi-asset CFD broker, today announced the launch of XAUUSD247. CME Group recently announced plans to expand trading of certain gold futures products to 24/7, subject to regulatory review. XAUUSD247 is a separate OTC CFD product offered by Vantage.
